disclaimer.title: Medical disclaimer
disclaimer.body: Flex, your AI coach, provides general fitness and nutrition advice for informational purposes only. It does not provide medical diagnoses and is not a substitute for professional medical advice. Consult a doctor for any medical concerns before following this advice.
